auth.codeSent: Verification code sent, please check your email
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.registerDisabled: Registration is currently disabled. New accounts cannot be created.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emailReminderDesc: Receive email notifications 24 hours before a contest starts
dashboard.sendContestBodyDesc: Attach contest description in reminder emails (collapsed by default)
dashboard.noContests: No contests starting in the next 24 hours
dashboard.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action is irreversible.
dashboard.nextReminder: Daily reminders are sent at 08:00 CST (server time)

changeEmail.title: Change Email
changeEmail.step1Desc: Current email: {{email}}. Enter your new email address. Verification codes will be sent to both addresses.
changeEmail.codeSent: Verification codes sent to both email addresses
changeEmail.step2Desc: Enter the codes sent to {{oldEmail}} and {{newEmail}}.

smtp.passwordHelp: Leave blank to keep existing password
smtp.retryMaxAttemptsHelp: How many times to retry after the first failure (1–10)
smtp.retryIntervalHelp: Seconds to wait between retry attempts
smtp.bccBatchSizeHelp: Exceeding this splits into multiple BCC sends; 0 = no limit (all in one send)
smtp.notConfigured: SMTP is not configured. Users cannot register until SMTP is set up.

system.triggerDesc: Manually trigger the reminder job. Emails will be sent to all users with reminders enabled for contests starting in the next 24 hours (already-sent contests are skipped).
system.scheduleInfo: Scheduled reminders run automatically each day at (CST):
system.scheduleNone: No schedule configured. Go to the Schedule tab to set up times.

site.siteTitleHelp: Displayed in the page title and navbar. Default: Luogu Contest Reminder
site.faviconUrlHelp: URL for the page icon (leave blank to use default)
site.contestCacheTtlHelp: 0 = no cache (always fetch from Luogu API); N = cache results for N minutes
site.reminderAdvanceDaysHelp: Send email reminders when a contest starts within N days. Default is 1 (contest starts today).

scheduler.desc: Set the times to automatically send daily reminders (CST, 24-hour). Each run skips contests already reminded.
scheduler.empty: No scheduled times. At least one is required.
scheduler.emptyError: At least one scheduled time is required

emailTemplate.subject: Email Subject
emailTemplate.resetConfirm: Overwrite with the default template content?
emailTemplate.emptyFallback: Leave blank to use system default

security.allowRegisterHelp: When disabled, new users cannot register themselves (admin can still create accounts from the Users tab)
security.blockDisposableEmailHelp: When enabled, disposable/temporary email addresses are checked via disposablemail.io and rejected when sending verification codes
security.sessionExpireDaysHelp: JWT token lifetime in days. Changes apply to new logins.
security.turnstileSecretKeyHelp: Server-side secret key. Leave blank to keep existing value.

about.title: About
about.description: An open-source email reminder system for Luogu contests.
